name: John Coltrane
description: Saxophonist and composer whose restless evolution — from hard bop through modal jazz to free improvisation — redefined the possibilities of the tenor and soprano saxophone.

name: Radiohead
description: Oxford five-piece whose arc from guitar-band anthems through electronic reinvention made them one of the most critically acclaimed acts of their generation.

name: Bonnie "Prince" Billy
description: Will Oldham's three-decade catalog — from the raw Palace Brothers recordings through the Bonnie 'Prince' Billy years — is one of American music's most singular and restless bodies of work.
